headline_seed: U.S.-Iran airstrikes intensify as Tehran says deal is in ‘crisis phase’ - The Washington Post
draft_text:
#BreakingMews
U.S. and Iran exchanged heavy strikes Monday. Iran declared Hormuz closed; Trump announced a 20% tariff on all cargo transiting the strait. NPR and The Washington Post both confirm Brent crude rose on the escalation.

And that's the mews.
